mission.title: alertmanager: Expose alert fingerprint in notification template
mission.description: Expose alert fingerprint in notification template. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current alertmanager deployment
steps.description:
Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation.

steps.title: Review alertmanager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
Currently the following information is available to the notification template:

```
// Alert holds one alert for notification templates.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Expose alert fingerprint in notification template
steps.description:
Hopefully fixes #1903 by adding the Fingerprint to the template data. My goal for this is to have the fingerprint in the Webhook data for downstream consumption.
```yaml
// Alert holds one alert for notification templates.
type Alert struct {
	Status       string    `json:"status"`
	Labels       KV        `json:"labels"`
	Annotations  KV        `json:"annotations"`
	StartsAt     time.Time `json:"startsAt"`
	EndsAt       time.Time `json:"endsAt"`
	GeneratorURL string    `json:"generatorURL"`
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Expose alert fingerprint in notification template" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Hopefully fixes #1903 by adding the Fingerprint to the template data. My goal for this is to have the fingerprint in the Webhook data for downstream consumption.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
